titleStmt.title: SII 16.240: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 240. (A.R. No. 311 of 1922.) VYĀPULAPALLE, HAMLET OF MUDIVĒḌU, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1481, Siddhārthin, Śrāvaṇa ba. 12 Friday, corresponding to 1559 A.D., July 31. The weekday, however, was Monday.

It registers a gift of wet and dry lands to god Lakshmīnarasiṁha at Rāmagiridurga by Jillēḷa Veṅgaḷayyadēva-mahārāju, son of Kṛishnamarāju and grandson of Peda-Kṛishṇamarāju of Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā. The gift lands are stated to be situated in Veṁpalapalli in the village of Mudivāḍa in Vāvilīpāṭisīma belonging to Rāmagiridurga of Penugoṇḍa-Mārjavāḍa which the donor is said to have obtained as amara from Rāmarāju Tirumalarājayyadēva-mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1481 Agunēṭi sidhā¨rtti saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 12 śu śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāsivarāyamahārāyalu vidyānagara maṁddu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgānu śrīhari Aparāvatāra Ādinārāyaṇamū¨rtti śrīvaikuṁṭhapuravarādhīśvaruṁḍai rāmadu¨rggamaṁdu prasaṁnuṁḍai vēṁcēyanavadhariṁcina lakṣmīnarasiṁhva
mū¨rtiki kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulaina jilleḷa peddakṛiṣṇamarāju gāri pavutṛlayina kṛiṣṇamarājugāri putṛlayina veṁgaḷayyadēva
mahārājulugāru Anaṁtamulayina daṁḍḍamulu sama¨rppiṁci [Icci*]na bhūdānadha¨rma śāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu śrīsadāsivarāyamahārāyalayyavāri rājyabhāradhuraṁdharu laina rāmarāju tirumala
rājayyadēva maharājulayyavāru tamaku Amarānaku pāliṁccina penugoṁḍamā¨rja vāḍastaḷaṁ rāmagiridu¨rggānaku celē vāvilipāṭi sīmalōni mudivāṭi grāmānanu veṁpala pallistaḷaṁ cēnunnu
Ā kuṁṭṭa maḍikiṁda mōdaliguttacēnu cakra ga 3 maḍi kha 1 Akṣarālānu mōdali cēnu mā phalaṁlō kala cēnuṁnnu Ā kuṁṭamaḍiṁnni śrīhariAparāvatāra Ādinārāyaṇamū¨rti śrīmadvai kuṁṭha
puravarādhīśvaruṁḍai rāmagiridu¨rggamaṁdu prasaṁnnuṁḍai vēṁcēyanavadhariṁcina lakṣmīnarasiṁhva mū¨rtiki kāśyapagōtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulaina jilleḷa pedakṛiṣṇamarājugāri pautṛ layina kṛiṣṇa
marājugāri putṛlayina veṁggaḷayyadēvamahārājulugāru yī dvādasipuṁṇyakālānanu mudivāṭilōni kaḍipolaṁ veṁpalapallistaḷaṁ cēnuṁnnu Ā kuṁṭamaḍiṁnni sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna
dhārāpū¨rvvakamugānu dhārabōsi sama¨rppiṁstimigāna śrīhari Aparāvatāra Ādinārāyaṇa mū¨rtti śrīmadvaikuṁṭhapuravarādhīśvaruṁḍayi rāmagiridu¨rggamaṁddu prasannuṁḍayi vēṁccēyanavadhariṁccina
lakṣmīnarasiṁhvamū¨rttiki kāśyapagōtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulayina jilleḷla pedakṛiṣṇama rājugāri pautṛlayina pinakṛṣṇamarājugāri putṛlayina veṁgaḷayyadēvamahārājulu gāru ta
thātithi puṁṇyakālamaṁḍu mudipāṭiloni veṁpalapallistaḷaṁ cēnuṁnnu maḍiṁnni sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakamu sadyaḥparichēdamugānu trivācakamugānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
stāyigānu svāmi Aṁgaraṁgavayibhavālakuṁnnu nayivēdyakaṭṭaḷa taḷighe tiruveḷakulakuṁnnu divyacittamaṁdu voppuna gonanavadhariṁccumani Anaṁttamulayina daṁḍḍamulu sama¨rppiṁ
ci yiccina bhūdānadha¨rmmaśāsanānaku galigina nidhinikṣepajalasāṣāṇaAkṣiṇiĀgāmisiddha sādhyamulu Aneḍi Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyāluṁnnu divyacittamaṁdu
voppuna gona navadhariṁpphumani sama¨rppiṁcina dha¨rmmaśāsanamu . svadattāt dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
